name: urlcrazy
title: urlcrazy

commands.name: urlcrazy
commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# urlcrazy -k dvorak -r example.com
URLCrazy Domain Report
Domain    : example.com
Keyboard  : dvorak
At        : 2014-05-13 17:04:01 -0600

# Please wait. 95 hostnames to process

Typo Type              Typo            CC-A  Extn
---------------------------------------------------
Character Omission     eample.com      ?     com
Character Omission     examle.com      ?     com
Character Omission     exampe.com      ?     com
Character Omission     exampl.com      ?     com
Character Omission     example.cm      ?     cm
Character Omission     exaple.com      ?     com

URLCrazy dependencies are not installed.
To install the dependencies, copy and paste the following command, or check the Installation section of the README.md file.
`$ bundle install`

binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.depends: ruby, rubygems, ruby-httpclient, ruby-colorize, ruby-async, ruby-async-dns, ruby-async-http
apt_metadata.description:
Domain typo generator
Generate and test domain typos and variations to detect
and perform typo squatting, URL hijacking, phishing, and
corporate espionage.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.

Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.
